description:
fz build foo.fz -o foo produces a standalone executable.

Pipeline:
- Parse → type → lower (.12a) → cranelift-object → .o file → invoke system linker (or lld) with runtime staticlib (.12b) → executable.
- Entry point: fz main() function, lifted to C main with int return.
- Pre-codegen pass: walk typed AST, hard-error on any construct outside the .12 in-scope subset (heap types, closures, with, list/map patterns, etc.). Error must name the unsupported feature and source location.

Verification: end-to-end test — sample .fz file with fact(10) → prints 3628800; binary runs on host without fz toolchain present.

Host target only. Cross-compilation deferred.
title: AOT driver: fz build → standalone binary
